author_bio: Ariana explores practical generative AI workflows for multidisciplinary creative teams.
content: [{"type":"heading","text":"Unlimited experimentation in Firefly"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Adobe Firefly now leverages Gemini 3 to support significantly expanded generation limits, enabling creators to test more concepts without workflow interruptions."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This allows teams to rapidly iterate on visuals, experiment with multiple directions, and refine outputs faster during brainstorming and production phases."},{"type":"image","src":"/media/images/blogs/create-with-unlimited-generations-using-google-inline-1.jpg","alt":"Adobe Firefly interface showcasing unlimited AI image generations powered by Gemini 3"},{"type":"heading","text":"What this means for creators"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With fewer generation constraints, designers can explore broader creative possibilities, compare alternatives side by side, and accelerate approval cycles."}]
excerpt: Explore how Gemini 3 integration in Adobe Firefly unlocks unlimited high-speed generations for ideation, concepting, and iterative creative workflows.
title: Create with unlimited generations using Google Gemini 3 (Nano Banana Pro) in Adobe Firefly

author_bio: Malik focuses on human-centered AI assistants across creative and productivity products.
content: [{"type":"heading","text":"The next evolution of AI assistance"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Agentic AI introduces assistants capable of understanding intent, taking actions, and completing workflows across integrated applications."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Rather than simply responding to prompts, these systems help automate repetitive tasks and proactively assist with creative and operational work."},{"type":"image","src":"/media/images/blogs/our-view-on-agentic-ai-ai-inline-1.jpg","alt":"Conceptual visualization of agentic AI assistants working across creative applications"},{"type":"heading","text":"Why it matters"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Embedding AI directly into familiar tools reduces context switching and helps teams complete more work with less manual overhead."}]
excerpt: Learn how agentic AI assistants are evolving beyond chatbots to perform multi-step tasks directly inside the apps creators already use.
title: Our view on Agentic AI: AI assistants that work for you, in your favorite apps

author_bio: Priya leads roadmap initiatives for video, imaging, and enterprise-safe model innovation.
content: [{"type":"heading","text":"Expanded generative capabilities"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Adobe Firefly now supports enhanced AI-powered generation across both image and video workflows, with improved controls and fidelity."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Custom models also allow organizations to train generation systems on brand-safe assets for more consistent enterprise output."},{"type":"image","src":"/media/images/blogs/adobe-firefly-expands-video-and-image-inline-1.jpg","alt":"Adobe Firefly AI tools generating video and image content with custom model controls"},{"type":"heading","text":"Enterprise creative impact"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"These upgrades make it easier for teams to scale personalized, branded content across multiple campaigns and formats."}]
excerpt: Discover Adobe Firefly’s latest AI-powered video, image, and custom model enhancements built for scalable enterprise-grade content production.
title: Adobe Firefly expands video and image creation with new AI capabilities and custom models

author_bio: Noah helps creative organizations streamline review and approval pipelines at scale.
content: [{"type":"heading","text":"Collaboration meets accessibility"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Frame.io’s Adobe.com integration simplifies onboarding and access for teams managing review and feedback workflows."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Creative stakeholders can collaborate faster with centralized feedback, timestamped comments, and streamlined approval pipelines."},{"type":"image","src":"/media/images/blogs/get-your-creative-team-on-the-inline-1.jpg","alt":"Creative team collaborating through Frame.io review and approval dashboard"},{"type":"heading","text":"Improving team efficiency"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"By reducing fragmented communication, teams can move projects from draft to delivery with greater speed and clarity."}]
excerpt: See how Frame.io’s availability on Adobe.com makes collaborative review, approval, and production workflows more accessible to teams.
title: Get your creative team on the same page with Frame.io, now available on Adobe.com

author_bio: Elena researches content sourcing patterns and creative reuse across global teams.
content: [{"type":"heading","text":"A better content discovery experience"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Adobe Stock’s redesigned website introduces improved search, filtering, and browsing capabilities for asset discovery."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Creators can now find, preview, and refine stock content more efficiently across images, templates, and motion assets."},{"type":"image","src":"/media/images/blogs/discover-and-perfect-great-content-with-inline-1.jpg","alt":"Adobe Stock redesigned interface highlighting improved asset discovery tools"},{"type":"heading","text":"Faster sourcing for campaigns"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Improved discovery tools help teams reduce sourcing time and maintain consistency across brand assets."}]
excerpt: Explore Adobe Stock’s redesigned platform built to improve discovery, curation, and refinement of premium creative assets.
title: Discover and perfect great content with Adobe Stock's new site

author_bio: Luca advises studios on texture pipelines, material systems, and 3D production efficiency.
content: [{"type":"heading","text":"Smarter 3D texturing workflows"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Latest Substance 3D enhancements improve material editing, texture control, and procedural workflow flexibility."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Artists can now iterate faster while maintaining granular control over texture detail and asset consistency."},{"type":"image","src":"/media/images/blogs/more-control-less-friction-in-texturing-inline-1.jpg","alt":"3D artist editing textures using latest Adobe Substance 3D workflow tools"},{"type":"heading","text":"Production-ready improvements"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"These upgrades reduce repetitive manual adjustments and improve throughput for 3D content teams."}]
excerpt: Discover the newest Substance 3D updates designed to streamline texturing pipelines and enhance creative precision in 3D production.
title: More control, less friction in texturing workflows: The latest Substance 3D innovations

author_bio: Sofia translates macro cultural signals into practical guidance for creators and brands.
content: [{"type":"heading","text":"The rise of trend-driven creativity"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Adobe’s 2026 Creative Trends reveal how creators are adapting to shifting audience expectations and cultural signals."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Brands and individuals alike are leveraging these trends to produce more resonant, relevant, and engaging creative work."},{"type":"image","src":"/media/images/blogs/how-creators-are-leveraging-adobe-s-inline-1.jpg","alt":"Creative professionals applying Adobe 2026 design and branding trends"},{"type":"heading","text":"Applying trends strategically"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Teams can use trend insights to guide campaign themes, design direction, and storytelling decisions."}]
excerpt: Understand how modern creators are applying Adobe’s 2026 Creative Trends to shape campaigns, content, and audience engagement.
title: How creators are leveraging Adobe's 2026 Creative Trends

author_bio: Ethan writes about typography, interface systems, and emerging design technologies.
content: [{"type":"heading","text":"Where design meets innovation"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Typography and emerging technologies continue to reshape how creators build experiences and communicate visually."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Creative thinkers who combine technical fluency with design fundamentals are best positioned to lead future innovation."},{"type":"image","src":"/media/images/blogs/how-to-shape-the-future-with-inline-1.jpg","alt":"Typography and digital design concepts representing future-focused creative thinking"},{"type":"heading","text":"Preparing for tomorrow"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Investing in design systems, experimentation, and technical literacy helps teams stay ahead of creative shifts."}]
excerpt: Explore how typography, emerging technologies, and innovative design thinking combine to influence the future of creative work.
title: How to shape the future with type, tech, and creative thinking

author_bio: Ariana explores practical generative AI workflows for multidisciplinary creative teams.
content: [{"type":"heading","text":"Designed for emerging creators"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Adobe MAX Creator Track introduces sessions tailored for freelancers, side hustlers, and creators building independent careers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Topics include monetization, branding, audience growth, and practical strategies for turning passion into business."},{"type":"image","src":"/media/images/blogs/building-a-side-hustle-or-creative-inline-1.jpg","alt":"Adobe MAX Creator Track session for freelancers and aspiring creative entrepreneurs"},{"type":"heading","text":"Career-building opportunities"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The track offers valuable insights for creators looking to scale freelance work or launch sustainable creative ventures."}]
excerpt: Learn how Adobe MAX’s new Creator Track helps aspiring creatives build side hustles, monetize skills, and grow their personal brand.
title: Building a side hustle or creative passion? Check out the new Adobe MAX Creator Track

author_bio: Malik focuses on human-centered AI assistants across creative and productivity products.
content: [{"type":"heading","text":"Celebrating emerging creative talent"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Adobe MAX highlights a new generation of creators making waves across design, motion, digital art, and storytelling."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Attendees can explore their work, hear their stories, and learn from the innovative processes behind standout projects."},{"type":"image","src":"/media/images/blogs/meet-the-new-generation-of-creative-inline-1.jpg","alt":"Featured emerging creators and speakers showcased at Adobe MAX"},{"type":"heading","text":"Why it inspires the community"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Showcasing fresh talent helps inspire the wider creative community and spotlights the future of the industry."}]
